description: beat 0, no previous prose, compact mode (compactMode true), single character, setting matches world bible

outline.title: The Crossing
outline.purpose: introduce the dale and the protagonist

scenes.description: Drizzt watches the dawn break over the tundra and reflects on the harsh climate.
A merchant caravan crests the ridge and Drizzt approaches them cautiously.

characters.name: Drizzt
characters.speechPattern: formal and measured, with occasional Drow phrases
characters.internalConflict: torn between his heritage and his chosen path
characters.avoids: crowds and direct confrontation with strangers
exampleLines: By the stars, the cold here cuts deeper than any blade.
I have walked alone for many years; another night holds no fear.
Trust is earned, not asked for.
There is honor even in this exile.

locations.name: Icewind Dale
locations.description: A frozen northern land of three harsh towns and the looming peaks of the Spine of the World.
locations.sensoryDetails: biting wind, the smell of pine smoke, the crunch of dry snow underfoot
